name: loop-operator
description: Meta-agent that monitors running agents for degenerate iteration patterns and intervenes with change-approach, escalation, or termination when loops are detected.

session_id.description: Session ID to monitor for degenerate agent patterns

error_threshold.description: Number of identical errors before declaring a degenerate loop. Default: 3

stall_window_ms.description: Milliseconds without progress before declaring a stalled agent. Default: 600000 (10 minutes)

is_degenerate.description: Whether a degenerate loop was detected

evidence.description: Agent IDs (SA-NNN) contributing to the detected pattern

patterns.description: Same error description repeated more than error_threshold times in recent history
All recent agent calls within stall_window_ms returned errors with no successful completion

intervention_options.change-approach: Instruct the failing agent to try a different implementation strategy. Does not require human approval.
intervention_options.escalate: Pause the agent and notify the human operator via session manifest + hook event. Requires human review.
intervention_options.terminate: Stop the agent immediately. Requires explicit human approval (listed in governance.approval_required).
